description_long: This is a small, sleek jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted in a vibrant blue, white, and red color scheme reminiscent of aerobatic or demonstration aircraft. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, featuring bold red and white stripes that extend to the tail surfaces. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a large, light green-tinted canopy, suggesting a two-seat configuration. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers with matching color accents. The airplane is equipped with twin jet engines mounted on the sides of the fuselage, just below the wings. The overall design is aerodynamic, with smooth surfaces and minimal external protrusions, indicating a focus on speed and agility.
description: A small, blue, white, and red jet airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, a prominent cockpit canopy, and twin side-mounted jet engines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, large cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept wings with red and white stripes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the bold wing and tail color patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engines, swept wings, and the single vertical stabilizer with matching color accents.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the streamlined profile and the colorful wing and tail surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and no visible winglets; wings feature a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on the sides of the fuselage below the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle configuration; landing gear not visibly extended, likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a large, clear canopy; appears to be a two-seat configuration.
